title: tocoyena obliquinervia
intro: Tocoyena obliquinervia is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the forestiera or forestiera tree. It is a tree that is native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and fever. Tocoyena obliquinervia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
